title: Refresh returning managed prefix egress
description: When an expired RPL-managed prefix egress returns, restore the prefix to Fresh with its current rebuilt path while preserving absent fail-closed and static prefix behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Disappear/reappear/reparent regression passes; absent managed prefix remains unusable; static prefixes are unchanged.
close_reason: Tracked prefixes expired specifically by missing managed egress. While absent they remain expired/unusable; on egress return they rebuild Fresh on the current path. Explicit/static prefix behavior remains unchanged. Disappear/reappear/reparent test and full RPL suite pass.
